_doc: plat2json/eval corpus. Each plan carries a PUBLIC source URL, a license, a redistribution flag, and a license-free ground-truth mode the scorer can check WITHOUT a CAD license. Source images are NEVER committed (regenerate via harness/acquire.py from the URL); only FACTS (numeric keys, blind-read fixtures, plat2json geometry traces) are committed. See README.md and results/corpus_sources.md.
redistribution_rule: Code = MIT. Committable for ANY source: numeric goldens, blind-read fixtures, geometry traces (all facts, not expression; Feist + merger doctrine). Gated: the source raster/image — committed only for public-domain (US-federal) sources; otherwise URL-only and the user re-fetches. Not legal advice.
ground_truth_types: self_check: read labels vs plat2json-recovered geometry (license-free precision signal)
published_values: recovered labels vs the plan's own printed values (e.g. a vector text layer)
field_notes_key: read labels vs the surveyor's separately-recorded courses (OCR/VLM of field notes)
geometric_invariants: read courses must satisfy the survey's own structural constraints (closure, perpendicularity, equal opposite sides) — a self-validating golden, strongest for high-entropy values

plans.title: BLM cadastral plat T.28N R.71W 6th P.M. WY (Dependent Resurvey & Subdivision of Sec.10, 1997)

source.name: BLM Wyoming cadastral
source.pattern: wy.blm.gov/cadastral/countyplats/<county>/t<NN>nr<NN>w.pdf bundles a HIGH-RES plat (~9584x7578px) + scanned field notes

ground_truth.note: tesseract OCR of the bundled scanned field notes

plans.title: US Mineral Survey No. 52 (Garfield lode), T.29N R.100W 6th P.M. WY, 1892

source.name: BLM Wyoming cadastral - mineral surveys
source.pattern: wy.blm.gov/cadastral/mineralsurvey/<range>/ms<N>.pdf (+ /fieldnotes/ms<N>_fn.pdf); enumerate from each township plat's Mineral-Survey index page. HIGH-ENTROPY non-cardinal lode courses.
